description: Uploads Chen's typed intake form as doc_type=intake_form. Asserts zero procedure_order rows are created with order_diagnosis LIKE '%copilot-extracted%' for that patient.
what_bug_this_catches: If a future caller of persistExtractedDocument wires LabResultWriter to all doc_types, an intake upload would create empty procedure_* rows. This case asserts the upload path correctly isolates writeback to lab_pdf only.
